use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Interactive elements with multiple visual variants
Accessible button component with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A versatile button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Implements standard accessibility patterns with focus-visible rings and disabled states. Designed for Tailwind CSS integration with utility-first styling approach.
